title: Assessors; authority to employ attorney
doc_html:
§1903.1.  Assessors; authority to employ attorney

The assessor may make arrangements for the employment of counsel to defend him in suits involving assessments made by his office after a determination that the district attorney is unable to defend him.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 757, §1.
doc_text:
§1903.1.  Assessors; authority to employ attorney
The assessor may make arrangements for the employment of counsel to defend him in suits involving assessments made by his office after a determination that the district attorney is unable to defend him.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 757, §1.
